overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City at dusk. The player moves through a neon-lit urban environment with towering skyscrapers, flying vehicles, and bustling streets transitioning from covered walkways to open intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath the overpass, following the flow of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street to the right

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars creating a covered walkway
large illuminated advertisement with text 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH' and portrait
various glowing neon signs for shops along the right side of the walkway
tall street lamps with circular lights illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a covered pedestrian walkway. Neon signs and advertisements line the walls while pedestrians walk ahead. The lighting is a mix of artificial neon and fading natural dusk light from the open end of the tunnel-like structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with 24-hour convenience store

events.description: exits covered overpass into open street area with visible sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the 24-hour store, approaching the intersection

entered.detail: corner convenience store with large blue neon '24' sign and Japanese characters
futuristic flying cars hovering above the street in the distance
towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens onto a city street corner dominated by a 24-hour convenience store with bright blue neon signage. Flying vehicles hover above the street while towering skyscrapers rise in the distance against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: waiting at traffic light then beginning to cross the wide intersection
turning slightly right while crossing to align with the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, navigating between vehicles

notable_agents.action: green compact car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
massive vertical digital screen displaying advertisements
prominent spire-topped megatower dominating the distant skyline
tall pillars with multiple digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide urban intersection, moving from the sheltered sidewalk into the open street. Traffic lights and digital billboards line the crossing while flying vehicles pass overhead. The distant megatower becomes more prominent as the camera moves toward the center of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching corporate skyscraper complex

events.description: flying vehicles pass overhead in the open sky
ascending slight ramp leading up to the plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the massive corporate skyscraper complex, ascending a gentle ramp into the plaza

entered.detail: massive cluster of interconnected glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows
decorative trees planted in the plaza area
small structures with glowing digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a massive corporate skyscraper complex across an open plaza. The camera ascends a gentle ramp while the towering buildings loom larger. Digital advertisements and decorative trees line the plaza as flying vehicles pass overhead against the darkening dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian tunnel into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a corporate district at dusk. It begins under a massive concrete highway overpass, moving through a covered walkway lined with glowing advertisements and pedestrians. As the camera exits the tunnel, the scene opens onto a city street corner dominated by the bright blue neon of a convenience store and the sight of flying vehicles hovering beneath towering skyscrapers. The perspective then shifts across a wide urban intersection, moving from the sidewalk into the open street where digital billboards flicker and a distant megatower looms larger. Finally, the camera ascends a gentle ramp toward a massive corporate skyscraper complex, passing decorative trees and digital displays as the sky darkens.
